title: LND Cobblemon
description: A Cobblemon modpack based on the Cobblemon Official Fabric modpack, adding extra QOL, cosmetics and other features
body:
This modpack adds quality-of-life improvements,extra cosmetics and other fetures, specifically for our community server. Our goal is to deliver a polished Cobblemon multiplayer experience that feels alive, fair, and rewarding, whether you’re exploring, battling, building, or participating in server events.

Key extra mods: 
Cobblemon PokéNav – Enhanced Pokémon tracking and information
Xaero’s Waystones – Fast travel that respects exploration and base building Cobblemon Capture XP – Gain experience by catching Pokémon Cobblemon Capture PC Heal – Automatic healing when Pokémon are sent to the PC
Lootr (Client support) – Instanced loot so structures stay rewarding for everyone
Open Parties & Claims (Client support) – Form parties and protect your builds
Proximity Voice Chat – Optional immersive voice chat with nearby players
Gravestones – Recover your items safely after death Simple store - create your own store
CobblePass – Battle pass system to add xp - based progression with seasons.
